title: viola sempervirens var. orbiculata
intro: Viola sempervirens var. orbiculata, also known as the perennial pansy or heartleaf viola, is a type of flowering plant in the viola genus, characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and delicate purple flowers. The plant is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola sempervirens var. orbiculata are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote relaxation, making it a popular remedy for anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
